subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath sent down His proof, made manifest His path, and summoned all mankind unto His most exalted horizon wherefrom hath shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل دلیله و اظهر سبیله و دعا الناس الی افقه الاعلی الذی منه اشرقت
subcodes.subjects: @Hands of the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
